question:
Where are the two main places that the hazardous material identification number appears?
1) On the shipping papers and on the packages
2) On the shipping papers and on a secret document in the driver's wallet
3) On the packages and on paperwork at the shipping point of origin
4) On the packages and on paperwork at the shipping destination
canonical_answer: On the shipping papers and on the packages

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: On the shipping papers and on the packages

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: On the shipping papers and on the packages

appears_in.title: Hazmat Test Nj
appears_in.answer: On the shipping papers and on the packages

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: On the shipping papers and on the packages

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Test Answers
appears_in.answer: On the shipping papers and on the packages
